name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-58
title: Inv 17 cites 'tdd-subagent Inv 5' for brand convention, but Inv 5 is about E2E tests
description:
Stale cross-reference introduced during BUG-55 work.

tdd-subagent spec.md Inv 17 (lines 211-212) says brand prefix is mandated by 'contract Inv 35/36 and tdd-subagent Inv 5'. But Inv 5 of tdd-subagent reads: 'E2E tests are always required — every behaviour described in a feature spec MUST have a corresponding end-to-end test.' Nothing about brand prefix.

The brand convention anchor in tdd-subagent does not exist. The legitimate authority lives in rabbit-cage (the rabbit_print producers + spec invariants).

Fix: in Inv 17 wording, drop the 'and tdd-subagent Inv 5' phrase. Just cite contract Inv 35/36 (which is itself ambiguous re which contract — see related rabbit-feature scope-correction issue). Same correction needed in test/test-backlog-4-6-7-9-10.py docstring around line 100. Will be worked alongside BUG-57 (H3) in the tdd-subagent cycle.

history.note: TDD cycle complete (secondary item resolved by same commit)
